label: Bond Duration Carry
signal: Choose Treasury duration from the real-yield level and curve slope.
description: Duration selection on real-yield carry: DFII10 (synthetic) + slope — real yield >1% & steep → 20yr, >0 → 10yr, <−0.5% → 2yr. Duration-model returns, monthly, 5bps/side.
reference: Bond carry literature; cf. Koijen, Moskowitz, Pedersen & Vrugt (2018), 'Carry'
